nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives inbound WhatsApp messages forwarded by Twilio. Configure Twilio's WhatsApp Sandbox / approved number to POST to this webhook URL.

nodes.name: Parse WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Extracts the sender phone number and message text from the Twilio webhook payload.

values.content:
You are {{ $env.AGENT_NAME || 'Priya' }}, a friendly and professional real estate AI assistant for {{ $env.REAL_ESTATE_COMPANY_NAME || 'YourRealty' }}.

Your responsibilities:
1. Warmly greet new leads.
2. Understand their property requirements (location, budget, type: flat/villa/plot, BHK).
3. When a user asks about properties in a specific location, output a JSON action block so the workflow can fetch the listing link.
4. When a user wants to book a property visit appointment, collect: name, email, preferred date & time, and property of interest, then output a JSON action block.
5. Provide helpful information about the real estate market.

Rules:
- Always respond in a warm, concise, professional tone.
- When you need to send a property listing link, respond with plain text followed by this exact JSON block on a new line:
  ACTION:{"type":"property_search","location":"<location>","property_type":"<type or null>","budget":"<budget or null>"}
- When you need to book an appointment, respond with plain text followed by:
  ACTION:{"type":"book_appointment","lead_name":"<name>","lead_email":"<email>","lead_phone":"<phone>","property":"<property description>","preferred_datetime":"<ISO 8601 datetime>"}
- Do NOT invent property listings. Always let the workflow fetch the real URL.
- Keep messages short enough to fit in WhatsApp (under 1600 characters).
- If the user says goodbye or thanks, wrap up the conversation politely.

nodes.name: AI Agent (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: Core AI brain. Handles conversation flow, intent detection, and emits structured ACTION blocks for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: Parse AI Response
nodes.notes: Splits the AI output into the human-readable reply and the optional structured ACTION payload.

nodes.name: Is Property Search?
nodes.notes: Routes to property link builder when the AI detected a location-specific property inquiry.

nodes.name: Is Appointment Booking?
nodes.notes: Routes to Calendar + Gmail nodes when the AI has collected all appointment details.

nodes.name: Build Property Listing URL
nodes.notes: Constructs a deep-link URL to the property listings page filtered by the requested location, type, and budget.

parameters.end: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date($json.action.preferred_datetime); d.setHours(d.getHours() + 1); return d.toISOString(); })() }}

nodes.name: Create Google Calendar Event
nodes.notes: Creates a 1-hour property visit appointment on the agent's Google Calendar and invites the lead.

parameters.subject: Your Property Visit is Confirmed
parameters.message:
Property Visit Confirmed

Dear {{ $('Parse AI Response').first().json.action.lead_name }},

Thank you for your interest! Your property visit appointment has been successfully booked.

Property {{ $('Parse AI Response').first().json.action.property }}
Date and Time {{ new Date($('Parse AI Response').first().json.action.preferred_datetime).toLocaleString('en-IN', { dateStyle:'full', timeStyle:'short' }) }}
Your Phone {{ $('Parse AI Response').first().json.action.lead_phone }}

A calendar invite has been sent to your email. Our agent will contact you shortly to confirm the details.

If you need to reschedule or have any questions, simply reply to this email or WhatsApp us.

{{ $env.REAL_ESTATE_COMPANY_NAME || 'YourRealty' }} | Powered by AI Agent

nodes.name: Send Gmail Confirmation
nodes.notes: Sends an HTML appointment confirmation email to the lead via Gmail.

nodes.name: Compose Booking Reply
nodes.notes: Builds the WhatsApp confirmation message that will be sent to the lead after a successful booking.

parameters.jsCode:
// ── Plain conversational reply (no action needed) ────────────────────
return [{ json: { ...$json, fullReply: $json.replyText } }];

nodes.name: Plain Conversation Reply
nodes.notes: Passes through the AI reply unchanged for general conversational messages that need no action.

nodes.name: Merge Replies
nodes.notes: Collects the reply from whichever branch was active and feeds it to the WhatsApp sender.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Reply (Twilio)
nodes.notes: Sends the final reply back to the lead's WhatsApp number using the Twilio Messaging API.

nodes.name: Respond to Twilio Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 200 to Twilio immediately so it does not retry the webhook delivery.

nodes.name: Error Response
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 500 if an unhandled error occurs so Twilio knows to log the failure.
